prompt: Show the average attendance score for each course

inputData.question: Show the average attendance score for each course

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show the average attendance score for each course"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show the average attendance score for each course"},"startedAt":1771855516975,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants the average attendance score for each course. The attendance_score is in the grades table, which is linked to enrollments via enrollment_id. Enrollments are linked to course_sections via course_section_id, and course_sections are linked to courses via course_id. I need to join these tables and group by course, calculating the average of the attendance_score column.","sql":"SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  AVG(g.attendance_score) AS average_attendance_score
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
WHERE g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code","assumptions":["Attendance score is stored in the grades.attendance_score column","We only consider non-null attendance scores","Results are ordered by course code for consistency"]},"endedAt":1771855565709},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT

WHERE g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY c.code"},"startedAt":1771855565715,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  AVG(g.attendance_score) AS average_attendance_score
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
WHERE g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code

result.sql:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  AVG(g.attendance_score) AS average_attendance_score
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
WHERE g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code
